title: Incredibly Enhanced
description: A carefully crafted Fabric 1.21+ modpack with 100+ qol and optimization mods that enhance your Minecraft experience.
body:
# **Banner**
![Incredibly Enhanced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2c43ca9e6ea566cfe85398c363ccce1282d6aa3_0.webp)

# **Showcase**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9gRnfx3H2GE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Loader**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Enhanced** modpack is supported by the **Fabric** mod loader.

> To get the **Incredibly Optimized** modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/incredibly-optimized-fabric).

**Mods**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Enhanced** modpack contains **100+ mods** that will enhance your gameplay and optimize your Minecraft expierience.

**Features**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Incredibly Enhanced** modpack offers:

✔️ Shader support

✔️ Enhanced optimization _*2x to 6x FPS_

✔️ Replacement of Optifine features

✔️ Gameplay recording

✔️ Building utilities

✔️ Various qol additons

✔️ Better controls

✔️ Frequent and regular updates

✔️ & much more!

**Installation**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
> Download a Minecraft launcher of your choice ([AT Launcher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads), [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/), [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app))

> Login to the laucher

> Search for the **Incredibly Enhanced** modpack

> Click install

> Choose the newest version

> You have succesfully installed it!
